posts.text: Replying to @Sweetlydia when you know what you stand for, you don’t take the bait. @CNN @Abby Phillip

Trump’s immigration policy is cruel. Instead of speaking to peace in this moment, he used the national prayer breakfast to call opponents idiots, spread lies, and assert that he should go to heaven. @CNN @Scott Jennings

What is a crisis pregnancy center? Should I ask ChatGPT about my options? Where can someone still get reliable info and pills if they don't want to be pregnant? We answer all this and more in my new sit down series with @plancpills
This billionaire president is on his affordability tour and the take away is less pencils, less dolls, and more gaslighting. Joined @Abby Phillip on @CNN
Join me this #givingtuesday to double your impact for youth on their own!
Thanks for coming to my @TED Talks ❤️. Watch the full talk about what big tech has to learn from teen girls and where we go from here.  #tech #genz #internetculture #tedtalk
My friend @Elizabeth Camarillo and her family could use our support. #Tucson #Immigration
